headlines.title: Senate Republicans pass immigration funding after overnight vote
headlines.summary: After a marathon 18-hour vote, the Senate has funded immigration enforcement. The GOP bill funds ICE and the Border Patrol for three years....

headlines.title: Dept of Education rips AP for 'inaccurate, dangerous' claim that it neglects Black students
headlines.summary: Department of Education officials responded to AP reporting, arguing their civil rights investigations address students of all races, not just Black vs. White issues....

headlines.title: DHS has only 7 child exploitation analysts, Hawley measure would fund 200 investigators
headlines.summary: Sen. Josh Hawley said legislation he promoted with former NFL star Tim Tebow that just passed the Senate will fund 200 new investigators to combat child trafficking nationwide...

headlines.title: Dem senator bankrolling Platner's campaign ripped for downplaying abuse allegations in bombshell report
headlines.summary: Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse's Ocean PAC donated $10,000 to controversial Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner, calling him "wonderfully appealing."...
